nodes.label: AI as research and brainstorming tool
nodes.grounding_span: I typically use AI tools in the brainstorming step

nodes.label: AI-generated creative quality
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been quite disappointing in the creative department. The responses are generic and contrived

nodes.label: AI enabling broader exploration
nodes.grounding_span: I would not had looked at all of the systems that AI put together

nodes.label: AI democratization of content creation
nodes.grounding_span: AI is really impowering people who are comfortable with meh quality work to heavily automate their processes

nodes.label: AI as multimedia enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to integrate more multimedia into my projects. Not just images, but sound and possibly light video. I see AI helping with that

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It really saved time when got started

nodes.label: High-quality creative output
nodes.grounding_span: those of us who have higher standards really stand out

nodes.label: Creative expansion and novelty
nodes.grounding_span: I have more ideas, and a bigger backlog of things to get started on

nodes.label: Strategic delegation — uses AI for specific bounded tasks while retaining creative control
nodes.grounding_span: I drive the creative decisions, AI has been quite disappointing in the creative department
